summary: ORBITRADE UI/UX overhaul testing completed. Landing page and design system working perfectly with new dark theme, mobile responsiveness, and professional styling. Critical authentication issue preventing dashboard and trade timer testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Login form submission not working - stays on auth page after clicking 'Access Platform' button
ui_bugs.details: Backend API works (tested with curl), but frontend auth flow is broken. Prevents access to dashboard and trade functionality.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login form not properly handling API response or token storage
integration_issues.details: API returns valid token but frontend doesn't redirect to dashboard

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and price ticker marquee
Price ticker shows live prices (BTC/USD, ETH/USD, etc.)
Landing page is fully mobile responsive
New dark color scheme implemented (#080808 background, #00BCD4 brand)
Professional hero section with 'Trade Smarter with ORBITAL' heading
CTA buttons present and styled correctly
Auth page UI loads and is mobile responsive
Backend API authentication endpoint working (tested with curl)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication flow - login form submission not working. Backend API is functional (returns valid tokens), but frontend is not handling the authentication response properly. This prevents testing of dashboard, trade panel, and trade timer functionality.
